innovation_1.name: 基于双掩码建模与类MRI角度频率分析的物理材质解析
innovation_1.contribution_statement: We identify that existing 3D reconstruction and fusion methods lack a robust mechanism to explicitly parse and integrate complex physical material properties.

innovation_2.name: 基于多尺度角度代价体(MACVO-Net)与材质分量感知的深度融合架构
innovation_2.contribution_statement: We propose a physical material parsing technique utilizing dual-mask modeling and MRI-like angular frequency analysis, alongside a novel MACVO-Net architecture designed for material component-aware deep fusion.
